findings.title: Complete Absence of Authentication
findings.recommendation: Implement JWT Bearer authentication middleware before all /api/* routes

findings.title: No Authorization / Access Control
findings.recommendation: Implement RBAC with roles (submitter, reviewer, admin)

findings.title: Prometheus Metrics Publicly Exposed
findings.recommendation: Restrict /metrics to internal network or require auth

findings.title: Frontend WorkItem Type Missing Nullable Fields
findings.recommendation: Create Source/Shared/types.ts as single source of truth

findings.title: Review Type Field Name Mismatch (reviewed_at vs created_at)
findings.recommendation: Change frontend Review.created_at to reviewed_at

findings.title: Missing Index on change_history.work_item_id (FK)
findings.recommendation: Add indexes on all FK columns

findings.title: No Graceful Shutdown Handlers (SIGTERM/SIGINT)
findings.recommendation: Add signal handlers for graceful shutdown

findings.title: No uncaughtException / unhandledRejection Handlers
findings.recommendation: Add process crash handlers with logger.fatal()

findings.title: Mass Assignment in PATCH Work Item
findings.recommendation: Add whitelist of allowed update columns

findings.title: Webhook Endpoints Have No Signature Verification
findings.recommendation: Verify Zendesk HMAC, require API key for integration

findings.title: Missing CORS Policy
findings.recommendation: Add cors middleware with explicit origin allowlist

findings.title: No Request Body Size Limit
findings.recommendation: Set express.json({ limit: '16kb' })

findings.title: OpenTelemetry Not Implemented
findings.recommendation: Add @opentelemetry/sdk-node and auto-instrumentations

findings.title: Pagination Missing (FR-WF-012)
findings.recommendation: Add page/limit params to list API, add pagination controls

findings.title: No Shared Types Layer
findings.recommendation: Create Source/Shared/types.ts

findings.title: No Index on work_items Filter Columns
findings.recommendation: Add indexes on status, type, priority, source+external_id

findings.title: N+1 INSERT in changeHistoryService.recordChanges()
findings.recommendation: Batch insert all change entries in single query

findings.title: GET /api/work-items Has No LIMIT / Pagination
findings.recommendation: Add page/limit query params with PaginatedResponse

findings.title: GET /api/dashboard/board Fetches All Rows
findings.recommendation: Add per-column LIMIT or per-status queries

findings.title: Double Change History Fetch on GET /:id/history
findings.recommendation: Use lightweight existence check instead of full getById

findings.title: propose() Multi-Step DB Write Has No Transaction
findings.recommendation: Wrap in db.transaction()

findings.title: review() Multi-Step DB Write Has No Transaction
findings.recommendation: Wrap in db.transaction()

findings.title: transition() Not Atomic — Race Condition Bypasses State Machine
findings.recommendation: Wrap in db.transaction() + optimistic lock

findings.title: uuid@9.0.1 — 4 Major Versions Behind
findings.recommendation: npm install uuid@^13.0.0

findings.title: better-sqlite3@9.6.0 — 3 Major Versions Behind
findings.recommendation: npm install better-sqlite3@^12.8.0

findings.title: pino@8.21.0 — 2 Major Versions Behind
findings.recommendation: npm install pino@^10.3.1 pino-http@^11.0.0

findings.title: vitest@1.6.1 — 3 Major Versions Behind (CVE chain)
findings.recommendation: npm install vitest@^4.1.1 --save-dev
